latestHandover: Strategic decision made to retire self-hosted k3s. Migration plan for Supabase Cloud (Sydney) and GCP (Melbourne) issued. 13 findings across infra, security, and CI/CD. Phase 1 focuses on Managed Migration. GitHub-hosted runners and OIDC-based secret management identified as core security improvements.

sessionHistory.summary: Initial research and strategic pivot toward k3s retirement.
Detailed migration planning for GitHub, Secret Management, and cloud hosting regions. Findings refactored and validated.
